reviews.comment:
Desabastecimiento de combustible. Tuvimos que esperar. Mala predisposicion del operario para explicar donde encontrar otra estación de servicio

(Translated by Google)
Fuel shortage. We had to wait. The attendant was unhelpful in explaining where to find another gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5MWF6Q01nEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésimo! Un solo playero, un solo dispensador de combustible, el baño un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible! Only one attendant, one fuel pump, and the bathroom is a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5dXVUcGdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasé viajando a la noche, excelente atención de los muchachos! Mención especial a Enrique, se me cayó la billetera cerca de los surtidores el la encontro y me la hizo llegar hasta resistencia, con todo el efectivo, carnet, dni, tarjetas y demás. Personas de confianza. Muchas gracias!

(Translated by Google)
I spent a night traveling with them, and the guys provided excellent service! Special mention to Enrique; I dropped my wallet near the gas pumps, and he found it and delivered it to me all the way to Resistencia, with all my cash, ID, cards, and everything else still inside. They're trustworthy people. Thank you so much!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5cU8yOFNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Hicimos parada y compramos un par de cosas, buena atención del chico del minicompras... estaría bueno que mejoren la limpieza del baño, un asco.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped and bought a couple of things. The mini-shopping guy was very attentive... it would be nice if they improved the bathroom cleanliness, it's disgusting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5NVllejlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cuando paramos allí no había nafta, no es la primera vez que nos pasa, los baños estaban un asco, orrible.

(Translated by Google)
When we stopped there there was no gas, it's not the first time it's happened to us, the bathrooms were disgusting, horrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5c2NfRkpBEAE
